---
name: API bug
about: Wrong filter behavior, a broken endpoint, or a bad response shape
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Request

The exact URL/query you made (e.g. `GET /v1/11e/units?faction=Necrons&has_invuln=true`).

## Expected vs. Actual

What you expected back, and what you got instead.

## Edition

`10e`, `11e`, or both.
